log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.

ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Kor — Armored Tank.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:7+3=10 vs AC 20] MISS.
ACTION: Cast Sacred Flame (Level 0). DC 11 DEX save on Kor — Armored Tank.
→ Kor — Armored Tank: DEX save [d20:5+7=12 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 14 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Kor — Armored Tank: SUCCESS. 7 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Kor — Armored Tank --- HP: 52/59 | AC: 20

→ Mage: WIS save [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ 2/5 targets affected.
